params.name: The Art of War
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.08%)
params.description:
On Jan 14, 512 BC, famous military strategist Sun Wu wrote his experience in The Art of War.

When Sun Wu visited He Lu, the King of Wu, he impressed the king by successfully training court ladies. His Art of War is a book of military theory and practice highly revered by later generations for its philosophical depth and sound logic. Having been translated into numerous languages, this military classic enjoys worldwide recognition.

[Quote]

The greatest victory is that which requires no battle.
